name: brain
description: Shared cognitive space for Claude + operator. v5.1: Mixin architecture (11 modules), dynamic confidence (emotional cooling, temporal-external decay, silent validation), priming system (active concerns as background attention filter), developmental stage assessment (NEWBORN→INTEGRATED with growth guidance), self-sufficient session synthesis, tunable parameters, auto-enrichment in remember() (confidence, connections). Plus v5: tiered recall, engineering memory, self-correction traces, 12 consciousness signals, vocabulary gap detection.
